concerns.text: FR-004 mandates 'independent-sample statistical significance testing (Welch's t-test or Mann-Whitney U)' and explicitly forbids paired tests. The tasks (T024, T025) implement 'Paired Wilcoxon' tests. While the Plan overrides this, the tasks lack a specific task to update the Spec or document the deviation formally. The implementer cannot satisfy FR-004 as written because the tasks explicitly contradict it. A task to amend FR-004 or add a 'Deviation Log' is missing.

FR-001 requires downloading 'Elastic Modulus' from Materials Project. The Plan and Task T003 substitute 'Formation Energy' from OQMD. There is no task explicitly addressing the substitution of the dataset or updating the requirement to reflect 'Formation Energy' instead of 'Elastic Modulus'. The implementer will fail to satisfy FR-001 as written.

SC-005 requires measuring consistency across 'Elastic Modulus, Band Gap, Thermal Conductivity'. The implementation uses 'Formation Energy' instead of Elastic Modulus. No task exists to update SC-005 or the success criteria to reflect the actual datasets used, creating a gap between the success criteria and the implemented tasks.

Task T003 references 'OQMD (Band Gap)' and 'AFLOW (Thermal Conductivity)' but the Spec FR-001 lists 'Elastic Modulus' as the third property. The task description does not explicitly mention the substitution of 'Formation Energy' for 'Elastic Modulus' which is the critical scope change defined in the Plan. This creates ambiguity in the task description regarding the specific dataset to fetch.
